headline: Government Cloud Migration Only 38% Complete After 4 Years
context: MyGovCloud programme reached only 38% completion by February 2026 four years after its 2022 launch.

cards.big: Government cloud migration only 38% complete 4 years after launch
cards.sub: Legacy systems and security concerns slow transition of 800 applications

cards.big: Only 304 of 800 applications migrated to cloud platforms
cards.sub: Remaining 496 include critical services like tax immigration and health

cards.big: RM2.8 billion spent but RM1.8 billion more needed to complete
cards.sub: Original budget of RM3.2 billion insufficient due to scope expansion

cards.big: Security audit found 12 migrated systems had higher vulnerability
cards.sub: Rapid migration without adequate testing introduced new attack surfaces

cards.big: Cloud migration tests whether government can modernize systems without creating new risks
38% government cloud migration after 4 years. Digital transformation stalls when agencies lack technical capacity.
